basic_details.job_title: FDDI – Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff – 8 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Footwear Design & Development Institute (FDDI) Recruitment 2026 for 8 posts of Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff. Candidates with 8th Pass, 10th Pass, 12th Pass, Bachelor’s/Master’s Degree with Diploma Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 11-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through FDDI official website.

qualification.education_qualification: 8th Pass, 10th Pass, 12th Pass, Bachelor’s/Master’s Degree with Diploma in Footwear Design, Master Degree/PG Diploma in Design/Leather Design, Master Degree in Management/Retail

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the FDDI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: FDDI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff Posts
